keyPoints: Demand Paging: Pages in a process on demand.
Copy-on-Write: A technique for reducing page faults by copying modified pages.
Page Replacement Algorithms: Optimal page replacement policies to minimize page faults.
Optimal Page Replacement Algorithm: FIFO, LRU, and MRU algorithms.
Least Recently Used (LRU) Page Replacement Algorithm: Swaps the least recently used page.
Most Recently Used (MRU) Page Replacement Algorithm: Swaps the most recently used page.
First-In-First-Out (FIFO) Page Replacement Algorithm: Swaps the first page in the list.
Page Fault Handlers: Handle page faults by replacing or discarding pages.
Page Faults: An exception that occurs when a page is not in memory.
Virtual Memory: An illusion of a large memory space by combining physical memory and disk storage.
